Title: alt - Channel Properties
Content:
Endpoints

/v3/payment_requests /v3/payment_tokens /v2/payments
Payment Requests Payment Tokens Legacy Payments

/v3/payment_requests

Create and manage one-time and merchant-initiated payments across channels.

💳

Cards

One-time and MIT

IDR PHP /v3/payment_requests PAY
View properties
Request fieldsDescription
mid_labelAcquirer MID label.
statement_descriptorStatement text.
card_on_file_typeCOF type for recurring.
transaction_sequenceCOF transaction sequence.
network_transaction_idNetwork transaction identifier.
skip_three_dsSkip 3DS if permitted.
success_return_urlSuccess redirect URL.
failure_return_urlFailure/cancel redirect URL.
card_detailsCard details (sensitive/encrypted/optional CVN).
billing_informationBilling address block.
installment_configurationInstallment terms + interval.
recurring_configurationRecurring expiry + frequency.
Response fieldsDescription
card_detailsCard details response and verification results.
mid_labelAcquirer MID label.
statement_descriptorStatement text.
card_on_file_typeCOF type.
transaction_sequenceCOF transaction sequence.
network_transaction_idNetwork transaction identifier.
skip_three_dsWhether 3DS was skipped.
success_return_urlSuccess redirect URL.
failure_return_urlFailure/cancel redirect URL.
installment_configurationInstallment settings.
billing_informationBilling address.
recurring_configurationRecurring settings.
📱

eWallets

One-time

IDR PHP /v3/payment_requests PAY
View properties
Request/Response fieldsDescription
account_mobile_numberCustomer mobile number.
success_return_urlSuccess redirect URL.
failure_return_urlFailure/cancel redirect URL.
pending_return_urlPending redirect URL.
cancel_return_urlCancel redirect URL.
cashtagWallet alias when applicable.
redeem_pointsREDEEM_NONE or REDEEM_ALL.
device_typeCustomer device type.
payer_ip_addressIPv4/IPv6 of payer.

/v3/payment_tokens

Save payment methods without charging immediately (reusability).

🔒

Cards

Save for future payments

IDR PHP /v3/payment_tokens SAVE
View properties
FieldDescription
reusability Use REUSABLE to create a token for MIT.
card.channel_properties.success_return_url Return URL after successful tokenization.
mid_labelAcquirer MID label.
card_detailsEncrypted/sensitive card payload.
skip_three_dsSkip 3DS if permitted.
failure_return_urlFailure/cancel redirect URL.
card_on_file_typeCOF type for recurring.
billing_informationBilling address block.
recurring_configurationRecurring expiry + frequency.
statement_descriptorStatement text.
 
{ "payment_method": { "type": "CARD", "reusability": "REUSABLE", "card": { "channel_properties": { "success_return_url": "https://merchant.example/saved" } } } }
🏦

Direct Debit

Save for future payments

/v3/payment_tokens SAVE
View properties
FieldDescription
success_return_urlSuccess redirect URL.
failure_return_urlFailure/cancel redirect URL.
account_mobile_number (mobile_number deprecated)Customer mobile number.
identity_document_numberNational ID depending on issuer.
account_numberBank account number when applicable.
card_last_fourFor card-based DD.
card_expiryFor card-based DD.
destination_account_idDestination account ID.
payer_email / account_email (email deprecated)Customer email.

/v2/payments

Selected channels only. Prefer Payment Requests for new integrations.

🏦

Virtual Accounts

One-time

IDR /v2/payments PAY
View properties
FieldDescription
channel_properties.customer_name Display name for the VA.
channel_properties.expires_at Expiration timestamp (ISO8601). 
{ "amount": 200000, "currency": "IDR", "payment_method": { "type": "VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT", "reusability": "ONE_TIME", "virtual_account": { "channel_properties": { "customer_name": "John Doe" } } } }
